channel.title: Marginalia
channel.description: A personal mathematics blog — analysis, algebra, topology, number theory, and logic.

item.title: A Functional Equation
item.description: This problem is from the ISI BMath and BStat 2026 UGB question paper, like the polynomial problem I posted previously.

item.title: A Simple Polynomial Problem
item.description: On 10th May 2026, this question appeared on the Indian Statistical Institute's BMath & BStat UGB entrance paper.
